sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_edges (originIndex UInt64, destinationIndex UInt64, indexValue UInt64);
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(originIndex, IF(destinationIndex IS NULL, 0, destinationIndex)) AS edge FROM geo_edges WHERE originIndex IS NOT NULL;
SELECT edge, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(originIndex, destinationIndex) AS edge FROM geo_edges) GROUP BY edge HAVING edge != 0;
SELECT DISTINCT h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(originIndex, destinationIndex) AS edge FROM geo_edges WHERE (originIndex == 599686042433355775) AND (destinationIndex > 599686043000000000);
SELECT AVG(IF(edge == 0, NULL, edge)) AS avg_edge FROM (SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(originIndex, destinationIndex) AS edge FROM geo_edges) WHERE edge IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(originIndex, destinationIndex) AS temp_edge FROM geo_edges) AS edges_query SELECT temp_edge, COUNT(*) FROM edges_query GROUP BY temp_edge HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
ALTER TABLE geo_edges ADD COLUMN extraInfo String;
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(originIndex, destinationIndex) AS edge FROM geo_edges WHERE edge IS NOT NULL AND edge == 1;
